sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15191" key="a)rkth=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρκτῆ</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δορά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n15191.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearskin,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0405.tlg001:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxandr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
